title: Community Resources

blocks.html:
Category Name Website Description
Legal Assistance Pennsylvania Immigration Resource Center (PIRC) www.pirclaw.org Offers legal services, education, and advocacy to assist immigrants in securing their legal rights in the U.S.
Education Welcoming Center for New Pennsylvanians www.welcomingcenter.org Provides job placement, workforce development, and educational programs to immigrants and refugees in PA.
Health Services Nationalities Service Center (NSC) www.nscphila.org Offers health and wellness services, including mental health support and medical case management for immigrants and refugees.
Community Support HIAS Pennsylvania www.hiaspa.org Provides legal services, resettlement assistance, and community integration programs for immigrants and refugees.
Employment Services International Rescue Committee (IRC) in Philadelphia www.rescue.org/united-states/philadelphia-pa Offers job readiness training, employment placement, and economic empowerment programs for refugees and immigrants.
Youth and Education The Pennsylvania Migrant Education Program www.center-school.org/mep Provides educational programs and advocacy to support migrant youth and their families in achieving educational success.
Cultural Integration Global Pittsburgh www.globalpittsburgh.org Engages and enriches the community through international connections, cultures, and social programs for immigrants.

excerpt: A curated list of trusted Pennsylvania organizations offering legal, health, education, and community support for immigrants and refugees.
seoDescription: Community resources for immigrants and refugees in Pennsylvania — legal aid, health services, education, employment, and cultural support organizations.
